name: Chairman
uniques: Founds a new city <by consuming this unit>
description: Settler - Founds new cities/stadiums. Like the Settler in vanilla Civ.

name: Groundstaff
description: Worker - Builds improvements and maintains the pitch. Like the Worker in vanilla Civ.

name: Youth Prospect
description: Scout - Fast reconnaissance unit for exploring. Like the Scout in vanilla Civ.

name: Car Park Hardman
description: Warrior - Basic melee unit for early defense. Like the Warrior in vanilla Civ.

name: Stone Island Shithouse
description: Pikeman - Heavy melee unit for mid-game combat. Like the Pikeman in vanilla Civ.

name: Firm Leader
description: Samurai - Elite melee unit for aggressive play. Like the Samurai in vanilla Civ.

name: Ultra Capo
uniques: [+15]% Strength bonus for [Military] units within [2] tiles
description: General - Military leader providing combat bonuses to nearby units. Like a Great General in vanilla Civ.

name: Set-Piece Specialist
description: Archer - Ranged unit for distant attacks. Like the Archer in vanilla Civ.

name: The Physio
uniques: All adjacent units heal [+15] HP when healing
description: Medic - Support unit that heals adjacent military units. Like the Medic in vanilla Civ.

name: Sweeper Keeper
description: Knight - Heavy defensive unit with high durability. Like the Knight in vanilla Civ.

name: The Pundit
description: Archaeologist - Culture-generating support unit. Like the Archaeologist in vanilla Civ.

name: Club Legend
uniques: Empire enters a [8]-turn Golden Age <by consuming this unit>
Can instantly construct a [Landmark] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Artist]
description: Great Artist - Generates cultural heritage and golden ages. Like Great People in vanilla Civ.

name: Master Tactician
uniques: Can instantly construct a [Academy] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Scientist]
description: Great Scientist - Provides research bonuses and tactical knowledge. Like Great Scientists in vanilla Civ.

name: Director of Football
uniques: Can undertake a trade mission with City-State, giving a large sum of gold and [30] Influence
Can instantly construct a [Customs house] improvement <by consuming this unit>
Is part of Great Person group [Merchant]
description: Great Merchant - Generates gold and trade routes. Like Great Merchants in vanilla Civ.

name: SS Booster
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Cockpit
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Engine
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: SS Stasis Chamber
uniques: Can be added to [The Spaceship] in the Capital

name: Coach Voyager
description: Scout Variant - Fast unit for scouting and pillaging. Stronger than Youth Prospect.

name: Firm Capo
uniques: [+25]% Strength bonus for [Military] units within [2] tiles
description: General Commander - Provides massive combat bonuses but cannot attack directly. Like a modified Great General.

name: Free-Kick Specialist
description: Archer Variant - Extended-range unit specializing in long-distance shots. Like an upgraded Archer.

name: Laptop Guru
uniques: Can steal [250] [Science] from enemy civilizations <by expending this unit>
description: Spy - Steals tactical knowledge and reveals enemy positions. Like the Spy in vanilla Civ.
